validate.notes: Docker build PASS, NOP reward=0 (correct), Gold reward=1 (correct). Rubric judge ICR=0.0 due to ARCHITECTURAL INCOMPATIBILITY: extract_config_hunks() only returns config file changes (AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md), but the gold solution only modifies Rust source files and never touches any config files. The rubric rules have source.path pointing to Rust files and reference containing code patterns, but call_judge() extracts agent_edit from agent_config_hunks which is always empty for this diff. The LLM sees 'Gold added: [code pattern]' vs 'Agent added: (nothing)' and fails. This is not fixable by adjusting individual rules - the rubric mechanism cannot handle code-only gold solutions.
